heroEyebrow: Miguel de la Lama · Senior Product Leader
heroHeadline: I build products with AI at the foundation.
heroSubheadline: Not features with a model bolted on. Products where intelligence is the core: personalization serving 30 million users, generative AI that moved revenue, and AI-native SaaS shipped end to end.

profileImage.alt: Portrait of Miguel de la Lama

proofMetrics.descriptor: ML-powered personalization platform serving 30M+ monthly users.
In-house AI translation platform replacing an outsourced vendor ecosystem (~99% faster, ~50% fewer defects).
Generative AI copy at scale, personalized to psychographic audiences (plus a 17% productivity gain).
Cross-functional leadership across Product, Engineering, Data Science, Analytics, Marketing, and Business.
End-to-end product design, architecture, and deployment of a multi-tenant field workforce platform.

strategicPillars.headline: Find the leverage
strategicPillars.subheadline: AI earns its place by moving a business number.
bullets: Tie AI capability to measurable business outcomes
Build business cases that unlock executive funding
Sequence platform investments against scale and governance constraints

strategicPillars.headline: Intelligence at the core
strategicPillars.subheadline: Architecture built around the model, not squeezed around it.
bullets: Data as product (internal and third-party integration)
Security and governance embedded from day one

strategicPillars.headline: Prove it, then scale
bullets: A/B-validated launches with clean measurement before scaling
MVPs used to de-risk investment and accelerate adoption
Lead 30+ contributors across Product, Engineering, Data Science, Analytics, Marketing, and Business

customSections.closingStatement: Curiosity is the only skill that never stops scaling.
